_comment: STAR SINGLE-EVENT Custom Detection rule with an INLINE hardcoded exclusion list. POST to /web/api/v2.1/cloud-detection/rules. queryType MUST be 'events' and queryLang '2.0'. The body is ONE boolean S1QL expression with NO pipes in data.s1ql; there is no lookup table and no dashboard. The exclusion is a hardcoded negative list appended to the base filter: 'AND NOT ({{EXCL_FIELD}} in:anycase ({{EXCL_LIST}}))'. Use this type when the base detection is a deterministic single-event signature and the allowlist is small and stable; use the scheduled template (exclusion_detection.template.json) when you need aggregation or a large/dynamic CSV exclusion list. BACKSLASH ESCAPING (validated 2026-06-24): the engine matches a SINGLE backslash, so write one backslash in the console UI but DOUBLE each backslash in this JSON ({{EXCL_LIST}} like 'corp\jdoe', regex like '\s'...'\b') so JSON decoding restores one. Events rules auto-bind the Target Asset from the matched event (no entityMappings). Mitigation IS supported on events rules: set treatAsThreat to Suspicious/Malicious and networkQuarantine deliberately if active response is wanted (default UNDEFINED/false = alert-only). New rules land Disabled; enable with PUT /cloud-detection/rules/enable. List with isLegacy=false.

data.name: {{PREFIX}} - {{DETECTION_NAME}}
data.description: {{DETECTION_DESCRIPTION}} Known-good activity is suppressed inline via a hardcoded exclusion list on {{EXCL_FIELD}}. MITRE ATT&CK: {{MITRE_TACTIC}} / {{MITRE_TECHNIQUE}}.
